text:
Resident Walk at End of SNF PPS Part A Stay CHAR 1 Indicates whether the resident walks at the end of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
 0=No, and walking goal is not clinically indicated
 1=No, and walking goal is clinically indicated
 2=Yes
 ^=Blank (skip pattern) effective 10/01/2016
discontinued 09/30/2018
670 GG0170J1_WLK_50_2_TURN_STRT_CD GG0170J1_WLK_50_2_TURN_STRT_CD Mobility: Ability to Walk 50 Feet With Two Turns at Start of SNF PPS Part A Stay CHAR 2
